ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_MZK_STRIKE.title: Strike
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_MZK_DEFENCE.title: Defend
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_MZK_NEUROTOXIN.des: Apply {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to random enemies {Times:diff()} times.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AWAKEN.title: Awaken
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AWAKEN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_MZK_UNLIMIT.title: Unshackle
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_MZK_STEALTH.title: Lurk
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_MZK_ENERGY_DRAIN.d:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Randomly }[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your hand.
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies [gold]2 times[/gold].
If there are [red]2 or fewer[/red] enemies, lose {HpLoss:inverseDiff()} HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ERODE_TIDE.title: Eroding Tide
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ERODE_TIDE.descrip: After you play this, each card you play this turn applies {ErodeTidePower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BLUE_SEED.title: Caerula Seed
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_LEARN.title: Learn
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SHARE.title: Flash Strike
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SHARE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SHOCK.title: Shock
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SHOCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
Repeat {Times:diff()} times.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_EXPLAIN.title: Elucidate
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SPEED_UP.title: Accelerate
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SPEED_UP.descripti: Add a [gold]Learn[/gold] to your draw pile, discard pile, and deck.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_CO_LIVE.title: Symbiosis
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_CO_LIVE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a minion, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]; otherwise, [gold]Drift[/gold] {Float:diff()}.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_TRAUMA.title: Trauma
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SIGN.title: Omen
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SIGN.description:
Lose {Damage:inverseDiff()} HP.
Your next Attack applies {SanityBuffPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] and deals {VigorPower:diff()} more damage.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_RETURN.title: Reversion
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_WHIRLPOOL.title: Whirlpool
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_WHIRLPOOL.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AWAKEN_PLUS.title: Awakening
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AWAKEN_PLUS.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_HURT.title: Hurt
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_OVERLOAD.title: Overload
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_OVERLOAD.descripti:
Shuffle {CardsAdd:diff()} [gold]Flash Strike[/gold] into your draw pile.
Shuffle a [red]Hurt[/red] into your discard pile.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SHADOW.title: Return
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SHADOW.description: Whenever you play 6 [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold], gain {ShadowEvolutionPower:diff()} [gold]Max HP[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SWEEP.title: Sweep
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SWEEP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and add a Dazed to your discard pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BIGGE.title: Gluttony
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BIGGE.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your discard pile and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them. Apply that much [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FOOD.title: Chargrilled Seafoam Leg
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_VAL_STRIKE.title: Tentacle Strike
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AROUND.title: Entangle
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SPRAY.title: Laceration
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SPRAY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and [gold]Harvest[/gold] {Harvest:diff()}.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AUTO_SHEILD.title: Tentacle Barrier
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AUTO_SHEILD.descri: Whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, gain {SheildPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_AUTO_PLAY_ALL.desc:
Add 3 {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Swift[/gold] cards to your discard pile.
Gain a [gold]Seaborn Family Bucket{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ECHO_ATTACK.title: Echoing Slash
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ECHO_SANITY.title: Echoing Erosion
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ECHO_GENERATE_AUTO:
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Swift[/gold] cards into your discard pile.
[gold]Echo[/gold] {EchoCountdown}: Shuffle in 1 additional card.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_END.title: Finale
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_END.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
Can be upgraded infinitely.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_COPY.title: Mizuki in the Mirror
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_COPY.description: Play {Repeat:diff()} copies of the last card you played. The copies [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SUPER_SPEED.title: Hyper-Swift
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SUPER_SPEED.descri: Whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ADAPT_PAIN.title: Pain Adaptation
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ADAPT_PAIN.descrip: Whenever you lose HP 4 times, prevent the next instance of HP loss.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FLOAT.title: Drift
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_HARVEST.title: Harvest
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_INITIAL_FORM.title: Born of We Many
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_INITIAL_FORM.descr:
Reduce the [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] required for a [blue]Neural Burst[/blue] by 2.
This effect cannot be stacked.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SEA_BLESSING.title: Blessing of the Sea
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_WATER_SHEILD.title: Water Shield
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BE_BIGGER.title: Hyperplasia
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BE_BIGGER.descript: For every {CardsPerStat:diff()} cards in your draw pile, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DQ_GIVE_ME.title: Offering to We Many
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DQ_GIVE_ME.selecti: Choose cards to add to your hand
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DQ_GIVE_ME.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If your draw pile has at least {DrawPileThreshold:diff()} cards, choose {Picks:diff()} card(s) from it and add them to your hand.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_NEW_DQ.title: Proliferate
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_NEW_DQ.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BABY_HS.title: Juvenile Seaborn
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SEA_WHISPER.title: Abyssal Whisper
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SEABORNING_POOL.de: At the start of your turn, add 2 [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_CALL_OF_SEA.title: Call of the Deep
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_CALL_OF_SEA.descri:
[gold]Drift[/gold] {Float:diff()} and [gold]Harvest[/gold] {Harvest:diff()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). The next {CallOfSeaPower:diff()} times you play a card, give each of your minions an active action.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PLANKTON.title: Plankton
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DRAIN.title: Drain
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DRAIN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your hand.
Next turn, draw that many cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_LIMB_SPLIT.title: Limb Split
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_LIMB_SPLIT.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Lose {MaxHpLoss:diff()} Max HP.
Add a [gold]Limb Recycle{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your discard pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_LIMB_RECYCLE.title: Limb Recycle
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_LIMB_RECYCLE.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {MaxHpGain:diff()} Max HP.
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.{IfUpgraded:show:
Apply 1 [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to ALL enemies.|}
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ABSORB_NUTRITION.d: Sacrifice all your minions. If at least 1 is sacrificed, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to their total [gold]Seabornization[/gold] + {Block:diff()}, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to the number sacrificed, and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_THROW_KID.title: Broodmother's Toss
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_THROW_KID.descript: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to ALL enemies. If your draw pile has 5 or more cards, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Cards:diff()} cards from the bottom, then put this on top of your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FRO_KID.title: For the Brood
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FRO_KID.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
Whenever a hit deals unblocked damage, add 1 [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BED.title: Seabed Nursery
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BED.description: Add {CardsPerEnergy:diff()}X [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] in your draw and discard piles.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_HATCH_TIDE.title: Hatching Tide
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_HATCH_TIDE.descrip:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile.
Deal damage equal to {Repeat:diff()} times the number of [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] in your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_COLONY_BREATH.desc:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the bottom card of your draw pile.
If it is a [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DEEP_SEA_COMMAND.d:
Apply {SeabornizationPower:diff()} [gold]Seabornization[/gold] to your minions.
If you have at least 2 minions, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_HIVE_WILL.title: Hive Will
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_HIVE_WILL.descript:
Apply {HiveWillPower:diff()} [gold]Seabornization[/gold] to all your minions.
Repeat at the start of your turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_RECYCLE_COMMAND.de: Fully heal a minion. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to its [gold]Seabornization[/gold], then draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PAIN_ECHO.title: Pain Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PAIN_ECHO.descript: Whenever a [blue]Neural Burst[/blue] triggers, draw {PainEchoPower:diff()} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BOTTOM_FEED.title: Bottom Feeding
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BOTTOM_FEED.select: Choose a card to add to your hand
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DEEP_SEA_SURGE.des:
[gold]Dredge[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to 3 times the total Energy cost of the other options.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DEEP_SEA_SURGE.sel: Choose a card to add to your hand
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BENTHIC_AMBUSH.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the bottom card of your draw pile is an Attack, deal [gold]double[/gold] damage instead.
Move all Skill cards from your hand to the bottom of your draw pile.
For each card moved, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BED_COLLAPSE.title: Nursery Collapse
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BED_COLLAPSE.descr: Play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 0-cost cards from the bottom {Cards:diff()} cards of your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SELF_PEEL.title: Self-Shedding
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_ABERRANT_REGENERAT: Whenever you lose HP, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] {AberrantRegenerationPower:diff()} times.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_TISSUE_COMPENSATIO:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have lost HP this turn, gain {StealthPower:diff()} [gold]Stealth[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_BLUE_LIFE_BLOOM.de: At the end of combat, gain {BlueLifeBloomPower:diff()} Max HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_GOLD_LIFE_RETURN.d:
For this combat, whenever you lose [gold]Max HP[/gold], immediately restore that much [gold]Max HP[/gold].
This effect does not stack.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_TIDE_REFLECTION.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
Deal 2 additional damage for each [gold]Swift[/gold] card played this turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_GROUP_HATCHING.des:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Cards:diff()} cards from the bottom of your draw pile.
For each [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] Exhausted, randomly [gold]Drift[/gold] {Assimilation:diff()} or [gold]Harvest[/gold] {Assimilation:diff()}.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_APHOTIC_MOLT.title: Aphotic Molt
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_APHOTIC_MOLT.descr:
Lose {MaxHpLoss:diff()} Max HP.
Gain {StealthPower:diff()} [gold]Stealth[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If you have lost Max HP this combat, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SEABORN_FINALE.des: Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to the number of [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] in your draw pile and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile {Hits:diff()} times.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PERFECT_ABERRATION:
Whenever you lose Max HP, gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
Whenever you gain Max HP, deal [gold]3 times[/gold] that much damage to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FROZEN.title: Frozen
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FROZEN.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, gain 1 [gold]Cold[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_KEY_CHARGE.title: A Key
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_KEY_CHARGE.descrip:
Gain 1 [gold]Key[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Then remove this from your deck.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PURIFICATION.title: Purification
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PURIFICATION.descr: Remove all [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] and [blue]Neural Amplification[/blue] from all allied players.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SANITY_STRIKE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {DamagePerSanity:diff()} additional damage for each [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] on the target.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_GROUP_FIGHT.title: Pile On!
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_GROUP_FIGHT.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for each [gold]Seabornization[/gold] on your minions.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SYNERGY_STRIKE.des: Choose another player. Whenever they deal unblocked damage this turn, apply 1 [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Juvenile Seaborn{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to the bottom of every player's draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_GANG_UP_SANITY.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {SanityPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] for each time other players have attacked this enemy this turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_SANITY_FLURRY.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This deals 1 additional hit for each [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] on the target.
(Deals {CalculatedHits:diff()} hits)
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PAIN_AMPLIFY.title: Pain Amplification
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_PAIN_AMPLIFY.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PainAmplifyPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to the target for each time it is attacked this turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_DEEPEN_SANITY.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {SanityMultiplierPower:diff()} [blue]Neural Amplification[/blue] to the target.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_FATAL_HARVEST.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills the target, gain an additional [gold]Key[/gold] in this combat's rewards.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_CUT_DOWN.title: Neural Proliferation
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CARD_CUT_DOWN.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Heal {IfUpgraded:show:all your|1 random} minion(s) for that amount.
